recommendations: Add AGENTS.md with the repo verification command and Agent Blackbox operating boundaries.
Install .github/workflows/agent-blackbox.yml so PRs emit risk reports, comments, and artifacts.
Pin AGENT_BLACKBOX_REF to a release tag or commit SHA; do not consume main for enforcement.

checks.name: Agent instructions
checks.recommendation: Add AGENTS.md with the repo verification command and Agent Blackbox operating boundaries.

checks.name: Agent Blackbox policy
checks.recommendation: Install a valid agent-blackbox.policy.json with conservative thresholds and blocked path rules.

checks.name: GitHub Action workflow
checks.recommendation: Install .github/workflows/agent-blackbox.yml so PRs emit risk reports, comments, and artifacts.

checks.name: Agent Blackbox version pin
checks.recommendation: Pin AGENT_BLACKBOX_REF to a release tag or commit SHA; do not consume main for enforcement.

checks.name: Verification command
checks.recommendation: Configure VERIFY_COMMAND or a repo-local verify script so reports include test evidence.

checks.name: Review override enforcement
checks.recommendation: Run enforce on risk-report.json and require the agent-blackbox-reviewed label for deliberate overrides.

checks.name: Harness and quality observability
checks.recommendation: Emit harness-audit, response-quality, overseer, and quality baseline artifacts for durable review evidence.

checks.name: Loop controls
checks.recommendation: Install loop policy, supervised-loop preflight, quality baselines, and halt-marker handling before autonomous loops.

checks.name: Review independence
checks.recommendation: Separate generation from evaluation with producer-reviewer, fresh evaluator, cross-vendor review, or rewrite-budget evidence before trusting unattended loops.
